name: app-light
label: Light home screen
description: The main nearby-device surface in light mode, with the WebDrop status, four orbits, a gently animated self icon, and static orbit peers.

name: topbar-brand
label: WebDrop status pill
description: Shows the WebDrop label and nearby or connected status without exposing transfer controls too early.

name: settings-icon
label: Settings icon
description: Opens the settings sheet for profile icon, ring color, language, app information, and version.

name: theme-icon
label: Theme toggle
description: Switches between light and dark mode from the main screen.

name: topbar-actions
label: Header actions
description: Settings and theme controls are grouped in the top-right header area.

name: orbit-empty
label: Orbit layers without peers
description: The clean App Clip-inspired orbit pattern before showing nearby devices.

name: orbit-with-peers
label: Orbit layers with peers
description: Nearby candidates sit on separate rings with static profile icons so orbital movement remains calm.

name: connect-sheet
label: Connect sheet
description: Peer selection opens a bottom sheet where the user confirms by swiping right.

name: connect-friend-strip
label: Friend strip
description: The candidate strip uses the same profile style as the orbit icons, with a small overlap and visible circular edges.

name: orbit-connected
label: Connected Venn state
description: The current device and selected peer overlap as an equal-size, static Venn-style pair with animated connected rings.

name: topbar-brand-connected
label: Connected status pill
description: After connection, the status line names the connected peer.

name: dock-actions
label: Connected dock
description: Send, receive, chat, and disconnect appear only after the connection is verified.

name: dock-send-icon
label: Send icon
description: Opens the send sheet.

name: dock-receive-icon
label: Receive icon
description: Opens received files and shows a badge when files are available.

name: dock-chat-icon
label: Chat icon
description: Opens the peer chat sheet.

name: dock-disconnect-icon
label: Disconnect icon
description: Disconnects directly with a short release animation.

name: send-sheet-empty
label: Send sheet before file selection
description: The user chooses files first; the send swipe remains disabled until a file is selected.

name: send-sheet-selected
label: Send sheet after file selection
description: A selected file appears in the list and the swipe-up send control keeps its icon below the text.

name: receive-sheet
label: Receive sheet
description: Received demo PDFs appear here with an Open action and the dock badge reflects the count.

name: chat-sheet
label: Chat sheet
description: Chat is separated into its own scrollable bubble conversation instead of sharing the file tray.

name: settings-sheet
label: Settings sheet
description: Settings hold device name, profile, ring, language, app information, and version.

name: settings-device-name
label: Device name field
description: The device name can be edited, including clearing the final character without an unwanted reset.

name: settings-profile-icons
label: Profile icon selector
description: Users swipe across the provided character icons instead of uploading a photo.

name: settings-profile-ring
label: Profile ring selector
description: The default ring is white, with optional blue, green, purple, and rose choices.

name: settings-language
label: Language selector
description: Switches every app label between English and Japanese.

name: settings-app-info-link
label: App information link
description: Moves design, stack, and orbit motion details into a separate sheet.

name: settings-app-version
label: App version
description: Shows the current prototype version, 1.0.7, at the bottom of Settings.

name: app-information-sheet
label: App information sheet
description: Explains the prototype and contains orbit motion controls without cluttering the settings page.

name: app-dark
label: Dark home screen
description: The same nearby-device UI in dark mode.
